tools.name: CrewAI
tools.description: Low-code, open-source platform for creating, deploying, and managing multi-agent AI systems with role-based agent orchestration
key_features: Role-based agent design with defined responsibilities
Flexible API integrations (Gmail, Teams, Notion, HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack)
CrewAI Studio for visual crew building
tools.target_audience: Developers and teams building collaborative multi-agent workflows

tools.name: LangGraph (LangChain)
tools.description: Graph-based orchestration layer built on LangChain for managing stateful, long-running agents with complex branching workflows
key_features: Durable execution with automatic resume from failures
Built-in memory for conversation history and context
Human-in-the-loop oversight at any execution point
Support for single, multi-agent, and hierarchical control flows
Deep Agents for planning with subagents
LangSmith integration for tracing and evaluation
tools.target_audience: Developers building complex, stateful agent workflows

tools.name: Microsoft AutoGen
tools.description: Open-source framework from Microsoft for building multi-agent AI applications with asynchronous, event-driven architecture
key_features: Being merged into Microsoft Agent Framework
tools.target_audience: Researchers and developers building collaborative AI agents

tools.name: Microsoft Agent Framework
tools.description: Unified open-source framework merging Semantic Kernel and AutoGen for building, orchestrating, and deploying AI agents in Python and .NET
key_features: Process Framework for deterministic business workflows (Q2 2026)
tools.target_audience: Enterprise developers building production AI agent systems

tools.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
tools.description: Lightweight Python framework for building multi-agent workflows with tracing and guardrails, evolved from Swarm

pricing.api_costs: Per-token pricing based on model used

tools.target_audience: Developers building multi-agent applications with OpenAI models

tools.name: Google ADK (Agent Development Kit)
tools.description: Open-source, code-first toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying multi-agent systems optimized for Gemini and Google ecosystem
key_features: Multi-agent by design with hierarchical composition
AutoFlow mechanism for dynamic agent routing
MCP tool support and 3rd-party library integration
tools.target_audience: Developers building multi-agent systems in Google Cloud ecosystem

tools.name: Anthropic Claude Agent SDK
tools.description: General-purpose agent runtime with MCP integration, subagents, and Agent Teams for parallel coordinated work

pricing.api_costs: Per-token pricing based on Claude model used

tools.target_audience: Developers building agent systems with Claude models

tools.name: MetaGPT
tools.description: Multi-agent framework simulating a software company with role-based agents (PM, architect, engineer) following SOPs
key_features: Role-based agent simulation (product managers, architects, engineers)

tools.name: Agno (formerly Phidata)
tools.description: High-performance agent framework and runtime for building, running, and managing multi-agent systems at scale
key_features: Self-hosted with no data leaving your system

pricing.details: Contact for pricing; no surprise egress costs

tools.target_audience: Teams building production multi-agent applications with privacy requirements

tools.name: CAMEL-AI
tools.description: Research-oriented multi-agent framework for autonomous agent collaboration, communication, and complex task solving at scale
key_features: Structured multi-agent interactions with role specialization
30+ toolkits (browser automation, multimodal, code execution, MCP)
Designed for millions of agents at scale
OWL (Optimized Workforce Learning) for real-world automation
tools.target_audience: Researchers and developers exploring large-scale multi-agent systems

tools.name: DSPy
tools.description: Declarative framework for programming (not prompting) language models with automatic prompt optimization for agent pipelines
key_features: Declarative programming model for LM pipelines
Agenspy extension for MCP and A2A protocols
tools.target_audience: ML engineers and researchers building optimized LM applications
tools.maturity: Production-ready for pipelines, experimental for multi-agent

tools.name: Amazon Bedrock Agents
tools.description: Fully managed multi-agent collaboration service on AWS with supervisor-collaborator hierarchical model
key_features: Inline Agents for dynamic role adjustment at runtime
Payload Referencing for efficient data transfer
CloudFormation and CDK support for agent teams

pricing.details: Based on model tokens consumed and agent compute

tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams building multi-agent systems on AWS

tools.name: Google Vertex AI Agent Builder
tools.description: Google Cloud managed platform for building multi-agent systems with ADK integration and deterministic guardrails
key_features: Dynamic agent discovery and capability negotiation
tools.target_audience: Enterprise teams building agents on Google Cloud

tools.name: Azure Foundry Agent Service
tools.description: Microsoft Azure managed service for building and orchestrating multi-agent experiences with enterprise tool integration
key_features: Enterprise tool integration (Logic Apps, Fabric, SharePoint)
No additional charge for native agent creation

pricing.agent_creation: Free (pay for model tokens and tools)
pricing.pre_purchase: Agent Commit Units (ACUs) for discounted rates

tools.name: Kore.ai Agent Platform
tools.description: Enterprise agentic AI platform with multi-agent orchestration, 250+ integrations, and configurable autonomy levels
key_features: Configurable agent autonomy (human-in-the-loop to fully autonomous)
tools.target_audience: Large enterprises with complex multi-agent needs

tools.name: n8n
tools.description: Open-source workflow automation platform with AI agent capabilities for multi-agent setups and RAG systems
key_features: Visual workflow builder with AI agent nodes
Human-in-the-loop checks at any workflow point
Any LLM or vector store support
tools.target_audience: Teams building automated workflows with AI agent capabilities

tools.name: LlamaIndex
tools.description: Data framework for LLM applications specializing in RAG and knowledge-intensive multi-agent workflows
key_features: Advanced RAG pipelines with indexing, retrieval, and ranking

tools.name: Ray (Anyscale)
tools.description: Distributed computing framework for scaling AI workloads including multi-agent simulations and training
tools.target_audience: ML engineers building large-scale distributed AI systems

emerging_protocols.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
emerging_protocols.description: Standardizes how agents access tools and external resources
